movie.actors: Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jim Belushi, Peter Boyle, Ed O'Ross
movie.plot: A tough Russian policeman is forced to partner up with a cocky Chicago police detective when he is sent to Chicago to apprehend a Georgian drug lord who killed his partner and fled the country.
movie.title: Red Heat
movie.writer: Walter Hill (story), Harry Kleiner (screenplay), Walter Hill (screenplay), Troy Kennedy-Martin (screenplay)
